The Bloominglabs Board consists of:

* President Calob Humble, elected March 2025.
* Secretary Kyle Dirrim, elected March 2025.
* Treasurer James Torres, elected March 2025.
* Officer at Large Kevin Ratcliff, elected March 2025.
* Officer at Large Adam Nuwer, elected March 2025.
To contact the Board directly, please email contact [at] bloominglabs [dot] org
